name: Bionic Momentum
short_description: A hardcore old school 2D physics-based sci-fi action puzzle platformer, with an emphasis on retaining speed and momentum
detailed_description:
Compelling single-player story adventure


    Play as a young man equipped with a powerful bionic suit.

    Embark on an immersive journey and discover many atmospheric worlds as you battle your way past evil creatures and tricky obstacles.

    Save the world from the clutches of an insidious entity, hell-bent on controlling the very fabric of the universe!

Fast-paced action with a unique emphasis on speed & momentum


    Harness your lightning-fast reflexes and unleash a thrilling, high-octane experience, with intricately polished movement controls.

    Master the art of movement, and through various means, gain speed and retain momentum.

    At times you must maintain an unyielding momentum, as even the smallest loss in speed could jeopardize your chances of conquering certain gaps and obstacles.

Extremely challenging levels, difficult bosses and many unique abilities!


    Immerse yourself in over 50+ meticulously designed levels that progressively test your mettle.

    Prepare to push the limits of your skills, as you confront increasingly challenging trials that demand nothing less than your utmost determination.

    As you progress through the levels, you will unlock a range of unique abilities that will aid you on your arduous journey.

    But fair warning — this game grows ever more demanding as you approach its climactic finale.

    Do you have what it takes to finish the game..?
